name: DatoCMS
description: Developer-friendly headless CMS with GraphQL API and real-time collaboration

description.value: Developer-friendly headless CMS with GraphQL API and real-time collaboration

repository.comment: Proprietary SaaS platform; client SDKs and tools are open source on GitHub (github.com/datocms)

initial-release.comment: Founded in 2015 by Stefano Verna as internal tool for Italian web agency Leanpanda; became independent company in 2019

latest-release.comment: Continuously deployed SaaS; no discrete releases

github-stars.comment: Proprietary SaaS platform; React-DatoCMS SDK has ~166 stars

primary-language.comment: Closed-source SaaS; client SDKs available in JavaScript/TypeScript, Ruby

database-support.comment: Managed infrastructure; users don't interact with database directly

api-type.comment: GraphQL for Content Delivery API; REST for Content Management API

multi-tenancy.comment: Free tier supports 3 projects; Professional includes multiple projects with additional cost

static-site-generation.comment: Official starters for Next.js, Nuxt, Astro, SvelteKit; built for JAMstack architecture

content-types.comment: No-code Schema Builder for custom models and blocks

field-types.comment: Single-line text, multi-paragraph, Structured Text (rich text as JSON), assets, links, JSON, modular content blocks, plus date, number, boolean, geolocation, color, SEO, slug

content-relationships.comment: Single and multiple link fields for model relationships

nested-components.comment: Modular content blocks that can be nested and reused; supports dynamic page building

localization.comment: Field-specific localization; per-locale publishing; role assignments per locale; supports AI bulk translation

content-validation.comment: Field-level validations and visibility options in Schema Builder

embedded-interactives.comment: Structured Text supports embedded blocks and custom components within rich content

content-versioning.comment: Content history tracking with rollback capabilities

draft-publish.comment: Real-time preview of draft content before publishing

scheduled-publishing.comment: Schedule future publications or unpublications; can trigger build webhooks automatically

approval-workflows.comment: Multi-step customizable approval workflows; Enterprise feature only

content-locking.comment: Automatic lock when editing; presence indicators; optimistic locking via API

audit-logging.comment: JSON-formatted event logs; API for SIEM integration; Enterprise feature

media-library.comment: Built-in Digital Asset Management with filtering by color, tags, EXIF, size

image-transformations.comment: Automatic optimization, resizing, cropping; focal point selection

external-media-storage.comment: Enterprise plans support custom storage backends (S3, GCP)

video-support.comment: Video transcoding, adaptive bitrate streaming, 4K support, auto-generated subtitles

svg-support.comment: SVG files can be uploaded as assets

folder-organization.comment: Media Area supports organization via tags and filtering

role-based-access.comment: Default Admin and Editor roles; custom roles with granular controls

granular-permissions.comment: Per-model, per-environment, per-locale permissions; locale-specific permissions on Enterprise

sso-saml.comment: SSO with SCIM provisioning; Enterprise feature

team-collaboration.comment: Real-time collaboration; presence indicators; comments via plugin

audience-restrictions.comment: Content delivery is API-based; access control implemented in frontend application

typescript-sdk.comment: Official TypeScript clients for REST API; React, Vue, Svelte helper libraries

content-type-sdk.comment: Content Management API allows programmatic model definition; CLI supports migrations

cli-tools.comment: Official CLI for project management and migrations

local-development.comment: Local preview via API; Real-time Updates API for live preview in development

webhooks.comment: Webhooks with custom transformations for external service triggers

plugin-system.comment: 200+ plugins available; Plugin SDK for custom extensions

admin-ui-customization.comment: Plugins SDK for customizing the editorial interface

documentation-quality.comment: Good documentation with API reference, framework guides, and in-depth topics; llms-full.txt for AI consumption

frontend-frameworks.comment: Official starters for Next.js, Nuxt, SvelteKit, Astro; community templates for Remix, Gatsby

search-integration.comment: Built-in Site Search with page indexing; 200 pages on Free, 5000 on Professional

preview-mode.comment: Real-time preview with Live Updates API; Vercel Content Link integration

ecommerce-integration.comment: Integrations with Shopify, Swell, BigCommerce; Snipcart e-commerce templates

analytics-integration.comment: No built-in analytics; external analytics integration via frontend

ai-features.comment: AI Translations plugin (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, DeepL); Alt Text AI plugin; MCP server for AI assistants

response-caching.comment: CDN caching; Cache Tags for fine-grained invalidation

rate-limits.comment: Free: 100k API calls/month; Professional: pay-as-you-go overages

global-regions.comment: CDN present in 200+ cities across 90+ countries

free-tier.comment: Free: 2 collaborators, 300 records, 200MB storage, 10GB bandwidth, 100k API calls/month, 3 projects

open-source.comment: Proprietary SaaS platform; client SDKs and tools are open source

pricing-model.comment: Free, Professional (€149-199/mo), Enterprise (custom). Pricing based on records, bandwidth, API calls

commercial-support.comment: Dedicated Slack support channel and editorial onboarding on Enterprise

enterprise-features.comment: SSO/SAML, SCIM, audit logs, workflows, static webhook IPs, custom storage backends, SLA guarantees
